TemplateVariant: FocusFlow Landing + Onboarding
Project: FocusFlow marketing site with Pro trial onboarding
Audience: Students, professionals, creators, and founders who struggle with distraction
CoreProblem: Notifications, tab switching, and context switching reduce deep-work output
CorePromise: Focus deeper. Finish faster.
Tone: Modern, clean, credible, SaaS-style
PrimaryExperience: Landing page plus dedicated Pro trial onboarding flow
LandingSections: Hero, Problem statement, Solution overview, Features grid, Testimonials, Pricing tiers, CTA, Footer
OnboardingFlow: Account basics, focus profile, work pattern, 30-day goals, static success confirmation
PrimaryCTAPath: Pro pricing CTA routes to onboarding.html
Stack: Static HTML + CSS
Constraint: No JavaScript, no frameworks, no build tools
Deployment: Vercel static hosting
CommercializationRoadmap: Stripe billing, auth + backend persistence, trust/compliance assets, analytics + operations
